titleStmt.title: SII 40.11: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 11. (A.R. No. B. 533 of 1929.) Mallipūḍi, Tanuku Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab built into a wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Vishṇu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1219 (Nidhi-Sōma-Surya), Iśvara, Makara-saṅkrānti, Uttarāyaṇa.
States that Pṛithvī-vallabha Dēvakumāra, son of the king Mahādēva, gave 50 cows and a piece of land for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Agastyēśvara. (Pub. S.I.I. Vol. X, No. 481).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē nidhi sōma sū¨ryyaga
ṇitē dēvētviṣāmīśvarē saṁkrā
ṁtiṁ makarēdhitanvati mahādēva
kṣitiśātmajaḥ . pṛthvīvallabhabhūpati
¨rbbahutaraśrēyasyagastyēśvarasthā
nē dīpamakhaṁḍamāśaśiraviprādā
ttadhānyagraṇiḥ . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1219 gunēṁṭi Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāṁtini svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśra
ya śrī viṣṇuva¨rddanamahārājulai
na pṛtivallabhadēva kumārulu
Agastēśvara śrīmahādēvaraku

Akhaṁḍadīpānaku kōṁḍi sakale
bōyuni vaśāna peṭṭina mōdālu 50
Ī dīpānaku peṭṭina kṣētramu komā
ranā seṭṭi beṭṭi dakṣaṇana kha 1 pa
tmaṭṭi polāna valumōpa Ātrōva
tū¨rppuna kha 1 Ī dīpānaku Ācaṁdrā
¨rkasthāyigānu Accuvāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
